title: Pig Mod - Classic
description: This is a mod about the pigs and adds things that kill them, but along with variants with BACON! Also some other Add-ons to the mod. + Join Chu-Index Discord for Snapshots
body:
# Pigifyer Presents: Pig Mod - Classic!
- This mod will conclude those pig mods where well, they don't exist. This mod is gonna start a clan for Pig mods! Starting with the first: Pig Mod. Theres gonna be Pig Mod+ and Pig Mod++, but for now it's just Pig Mod. This mod adds things such as: Guns, Weapons, Variants (in release 1.1), new foods, and 3d models. The mod is very particular when it comes to bosses like the Butcher, it really wants to kill all Pigs and you. Then Te- T- TechnoBlade, he doesn't really want to kill anyone but he's a boss. Then there's a boss coming in the 1.3 update but it's going to be called: Hypno-Pig, I'm not going to talk about much much what I want it to do is be bait for another boss. So download this mod, kill the Butcher, and create a pig mod to support me creating the mod!
Oh, and download the **[Programmer Art Conntinuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)** to make it fit better!
## Features
- Adds Pig Varients
- Adds Pig Tools and Weapons
- Adds New Enemies and Bosses
- Adds Blocks and Items
- And only needs Neo-Forge!


# Join Pigifyer's Discord!
Go to link

[Pigifyer's Discord](https://discord.gg/5MfNhz3XMJ)

## Recipes
It will be Updated every Update. Except Betas

for leaks and updates about me!

## 200K?
 Yoooooo, um just saying, can we make this the most popular Pig Mod? I know you guys can do it. 200K Downloads and then a MASSIVE update will occur. Soooo, YEAH YOU GUYS WILL ROCK!!!!
 (Heck I might even add Cackletta as a whole boss with soundtracks such as Cackletta's Soul, Fawful and Cackletta, and so on.)

##  **Dungeon of Piginess History titled:**
**The History of the Awful Dungeon of Piginess**

**-------------------------------------------------------------------**

In the year 2398, the Governor of Pigony Anxious University declared that the Dungeons of Smityness were far too easy for the students. Determined to challenge the mind and spirit of every University Oinker, he conceived a new trial —

The Dungeon of Piginess — a labyrinth designed to test the Antuligity (mind) and resolve of all who dared enter.

But everything went horribly wrong...

The Master of the University, known as the Overworld Lord Pig, mysteriously died under unknown circumstances. News of this tragedy soon reached Serk, Commander of the Piglins, who then alerted the masters beyond the Overworld.

The Nether Overking Pigony took notice, smirking with dark intent. He seized the Dungeon of Piginess, dragging it into the fiery depths of the Nether, transforming it into the dreaded Nether Dungeon of Piginess.

Despite this, it is still known simply as the Dungeon of Piginess to this very day.

The Patriarch Mannerfuls, the ancient leaders, passed down the burden of guarding this horrific dungeon across generations.

So beware, Youngintinlings — the adventurers — for this dungeon is no ordinary challenge. It is a test of wit, courage, and survival... and many have never returned.
